scripts.build: npm run -w @guild/api build && npm run -w @guild/web build
scripts.start:api:prod: npm run -w @guild/database prisma:generate && npm run -w @guild/api build && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/apps/api/src/main.js
scripts.start:web:prod: npm run -w @guild/web build && npm run -w @guild/web start
